title: Nutsuki Crunch
description: An earthy and crispy solo-dinner Japanese dish featuring raw-friendly nuts, whisked into a savory sauce.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup raw sesame seeds
ingredients.notes: For a touch of nuttiness and crunch.

instructions: Place cashews, sesame seeds, lemon juice, sherry vinegar, toasted sesame oil, and salt in a blender or food processor.
Blend until smooth but still slightly chunky for texture. Add water gradually to achieve desired consistency without being too thin.
Pour the mixture over your prepared raw-friendly nuts like almonds or walnuts for an instant crunchy base.
Gently toss everything together ensuring all nuts are coated evenly with the dressing.
